goal: Local scheduling guardrails prevent overlapping or explicitly stopped nightly runs.
narrative: A systemd timer or cron entry fires while another run is active or while a kill switch has been set.
expected_outcome: The wrapper exits before phase execution when the lock directory already exists or when a supported kill switch file is present.

acceptance_vectors.check: bats tests/scripts/nightly-evolution.bats --filter 'active lock blocks overlapping runs'
bats tests/scripts/nightly-evolution.bats --filter 'kill switch prevents nightly run'
